known_exclusions: manifest.json/run_manifest.json/resolved_config.yaml because some contain absolute local paths or config metadata
official_eval.json because it stores absolute command paths; equivalent metrics are retained in metrics.json
stdout.log/stderr.log and nohup logs because they contain environment paths and are not core data
upstream_outputs and case_details because case_results.jsonl and aggregate tables retain paper-facing metrics
LLM judge caches because aggregate inspector-swap metrics are retained and raw judge prompts/responses are not needed for data-only submission
note: Qwen/Kimi cross-provider runs use emnlp_p0_cross_provider_* names. MiniMax cross-provider rows are represented by earlier MiniMax full-ReAct artifacts included under run_level/minimax_mechanism_and_stress.
